data.name: Orgasm Lab Simulator 💦🍌
data.detailed_description:
Orgasm Lab Simulator 是一款充滿玩味、誇張大膽的2D風格模擬遊戲，你將置身於一間神祕的研究實驗室，專門研究……非常非常規的人類反應。



在實驗開始之前，你會收到一份「官方」同意書。看起來很嚴肅，聽起來也很嚴肅——但說實話，這個實驗室裡其實沒有什麼是真正嚴肅的。簽下它，走進去，準備迎接你人生中最可疑的科學計畫。你的任務很簡單：輸入任意單詞來生成新的物件，用滑鼠控制它們，並觀察實驗對象如何回應你的創意。



物理效果瘋狂，反應難以預測，整個環境就像是由想像力過於豐富的研究人員打造的混亂2D實驗室。科學？算是吧。樂趣？絕對有。羞恥？可選。

⭐ 遊戲特色

  • 快節奏且直觀的玩法 流暢靈敏的操作，帶來快速而滿足的「科學」互動體驗。
  • 輸入一個詞——獲得一個物件 實驗室幾乎可以具現化你想到的任何東西。想像力 = 工具箱。
  • 露骨內容與成人主題（18+） 專為成年玩家打造的火辣體驗。
  • 完全可互動的實驗室環境 點擊、拖曳、觸碰、旋轉——幾乎所有東西都會回應你的好奇心。
  • 支援單手遊玩 🤩 便利性是這項前沿研究的核心。

data.short_description: 沉浸在混亂又大膽的2D實驗室模擬中！輸入單詞創造物件，自由實驗，觀看不可預測的反應。快節奏、充滿玩味且完全互動——專屬於成年人的瘋狂科學沙盒體驗。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS
  • 處理器: Apple M1 або Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Orgasm Lab Simulator 💦🍌
data.detailed_description:
Orgasm Lab Simulator is a playful, over-the-top lewd 2D-inspired simulator, where you find yourself inside a mysterious research lab dedicated to studying… very unconventional human reactions.



Before the experiment begins, you’re handed an “official” consent form. It looks serious, sounds serious — but let’s be honest, nothing in this lab is actually serious. Sign it, step inside, and prepare for the most questionable scientific project of your life. Your mission is simple: type any word to create new objects, control them with your mouse, and observe how the test subject responds to your experimental creativity.



Physics is wild, reactions are unpredictable, and the whole environment feels like a chaotic 2D-style laboratory built by researchers with way too much imagination. Science? Sort of. Fun? Absolutely. Shame? Optional.

⭐ Features

  • Fast-paced and intuitive gameplay Smooth, reactive controls designed for quick and satisfying “scientific” interactions.
  • Type a word — get an object The lab materializes almost anything you can think of. Imagination = toolset.
  • Explicit content and mature themes (18+) A spicy experience crafted exclusively for adult players.
  • Fully interactive lab environment Click, drag, poke, twist — nearly everything in the room reacts to your curiosity.
  • Ability to play with one hand 🤩 Convenience is the cornerstone of this cutting-edge research.

data.short_description: Dive into a chaotic, lewd 2D lab simulator! Type words to create objects, experiment freely, and watch unpredictable reactions. Fast-paced, playful, and fully interactive—an adult-only sandbox of wild scientific fun.
data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Vietnamese, Greek, Danish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Norwegian, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Romanian, Thai, Turkish, Hungarian, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese, Indonesian, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support
